title: Junior SEO Specialist at Ecom Express

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Ecom Express
jsonLd.description:
Ecom Express invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Ludhiana location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ecom Express:
Ecom Express is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ecom Express!
